vietnamese: mua sắm / học / làm việc trực tuyến
example: Shopping online is very convenient and saves time.
Facebook and Instagram are popular social networks.

vietnamese: tìm kiếm thông tin trên mạng
example: We use the internet to search for information quickly.

vietnamese: thực hiện nhanh và hiệu quả hơn
example: Technology helps us perform tasks faster and more efficiently.

vietnamese: ít giao tiếp xã hội hơn
example: Using phones too much means we have less social interactions.

vietnamese: phụ thuộc quá nhiều vào công nghệ
example: People depend too much on technology nowadays.
Technology can make people lazier — they refuse to do tasks by hand.

word: spend too much time on screens
vietnamese: dành quá nhiều thời gian nhìn màn hình
example: Children spend too much time on screens every day.

vietnamese: bảo vệ quyền riêng tư trên mạng
example: It is important to protect your privacy online.
A smartphone is the most commonly used device today.
There are apps for almost everything now.
I downloaded a new learning app on my phone.
Always use a strong password for your accounts.
Cyberbullying is a serious problem among teenagers.
